meta.title: Zephyron Tech — We build software. Properly.
meta.description: Custom software engineering for companies that need it to work in production. Data pipelines, GIS systems, web platforms, internal tools — built end to end.

hero.headline: We build software.
hero.subheadline: Custom software for companies that need it built right — web platforms, data systems, mobile apps, internal tools. We take it from the first conversation to production.

portfolio.title: Some of what we've built.
portfolio.lead: A mix of live systems and projects in active development. We handle design, engineering, and delivery end to end.

flagship.name: ClearWay
flagship.description: An end-to-end data pipeline that processes raw road-surface telemetry from on-vehicle sensors into a GIS web visualisation — engineered for a municipality managing city-scale road infrastructure.

gridtime.name: GridTime
gridtime.description: A cross-platform motorsport calendar aggregating schedules from scrapers and third-party APIs across every racing series. Handles timezone conversion, series filtering, and a high-performance data API. Web app in development — native mobile app (Expo) in progress.

b2b.name: Client Websites
b2b.description: Production websites for two clients — a driving school and a university student association. Custom-built, deployed to Vercel, with a CMS for content management. No templates.

techstack.title:
Our defaults.
Not our limits.
techstack.lead: These are the tools we reach for on day one. We adapt to what you already have — and we're not precious about it.

items.name: TypeScript
items.desc: Strict, end-to-end typed surfaces — UI to API.

items.name: FastAPI
items.desc: High-throughput async APIs with OpenAPI baked in.

items.name: Next.js
items.desc: Edge-rendered web apps, React server components.

items.name: Spring Boot
items.desc: Production-grade Java services with auto-configuration, embedded servers, and the full Spring ecosystem.

items.name: Expo
items.desc: Cross-platform iOS + Android from a single TypeScript codebase. EAS Build, OTA updates.

items.name: GIS / GeoData
items.desc: PostGIS, map matching, vector tiles, WebGL.

items.name: PostgreSQL
items.desc: OLTP + spatial + full-text in one engine.

items.name: Redis
items.desc: Sub-millisecond caching, session storage, pub/sub, and atomic counters at scale.

items.name: Kafka
items.desc: Distributed event streaming for real-time data pipelines, IoT telemetry, and decoupled microservices.

items.name: CI/CD
items.desc: GitHub Actions, ephemeral previews, signed builds.
